w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: All the students of VIII Semester are hereby informed to carry out the AICTE
mandatory for earning the bachelor’s degree by
The same report shall be uploaded to the drive link which will be shared in your respective WhatsApp groups through faculty coordinators
All here are strictly to adhere to comply with the same,
further information, contact the respective coordinators of your section.
Day College regular student admitted to the 4 years Degree
Helping local schools to achieve good results and enhance their enrollment in Higher/Technical/Vocational Education
NSS/ Youth Red Cross Co-ordinators/ Chairperson CICC (College Internal Complaints Committee)/ SAGY
Adarsh Gram Yojana, Govt. of India) of the Institute/ Mentor
Preparing an actionable business proposal for enhancing the village income.
Setting of the information imparting club for women leading to contribution in social and economic issues.
Developing and managing efficient garbage disposable system
To assist the marketing of rural produce
Following suggestive activities may be carried out by students in teams as per their choice.
Spreading public awareness under rural outreach programmes
Contribution to any national level initiative of Government of India. For e.g. Digital India/ Skill India/ Swachh Bharat Internship etc.,
harvesting in urban and rural area
Rules and Regulations to be followed
All students strictly adhere to the rubrics which has been given by the Dean Student welfare. The rubrics is as follows:
Participation in workshops for one full day (outside the institution)
Blood donation (as a donor to be claimed once)
Attending NSS camps for one week
Students are informed to take Geotag photos for the activities which they are taking up without fail. They shall prepare the report as per the format shared.
